column4: Validate filtering of products by price range
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Login with valid credentials
3.Search for any product (e.g., "mobile")
4.Tap on the Filter option
5.Select the price range filter
6.Set the price range (e.g., ₹10000 – ₹20000)
7.Click on the Apply button
column6:
1.System should display only the products within the selected price range
2.All listed products should have prices between ₹10000 and ₹20000
column7: Products displayed within selected price range

column4: Validate sorting of products by price (High to Low)
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Login with valid credentials
3.Search for any product (e.g., "bag")
4.Click on the Sort option
5.Select Price: High to Low
column6:
1.Products should be displayed in descending order of price
2.Highest priced product should appear at the top
3.Lowest priced product should appear at the bottom
column7: Products sorted in descending order correctly
